Up - Enum constant in enum class frc.robot.libraries.XboxController1038.PovPositions
 
updateAlignmentState(boolean) - Method in class frc.robot.commands.AlignCommand
 
updateEstimationStdDevs(PhotonPoseEstimator, Optional<EstimatedRobotPose>, List<PhotonTrackedTarget>) - Method in class frc.robot.subsystems.Vision
Calculates new standard deviations This algorithm is a heuristic that creates dynamic standard deviations based on number of tags, estimation strategy, and distance from the tags.
